title: worktree_destroyed event payload
$comment: Class: OPTIONAL_SPEC_ID. Records the lifecycle event 'git worktree was removed and the registry entry deleted.' Emitted by caws worktree destroy.

worktree_name.description: Name of the destroyed worktree (the key removed from worktrees.json).

branch.description: Branch the worktree was on at destroy time.

spec_id.description: Optional: spec id this worktree was bound to at destroy time.

owner_session_id.description: Optional: session id that performed the destroy (always the same as the actor for non-takeover destroys).

removed_git_worktree.description: True when git worktree remove succeeded. False indicates the registry entry was cleaned up but the on-disk worktree was already gone or could not be removed.
